innateAbility.name: Essence Shift
innateAbility.description: A successful attack drains the attacked enemy heroes' attributes.

abilities.name: Dark Pact
abilities.description: After a short delay, Slark dispels most negative debuffs while dealing damage to enemy units around him and to himself.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Leaps forward and leashes the first enemy hero he connects with.

abilities.name: Saltwater Shiv
abilities.description: A successful attack now steals a poriton of the target's health restoration, health regeneration, and movement speed for Slark.

abilities.name: Depth Shroud
abilities.description: Creates a dark cloud at the area-targeted location.All allied units within the radius are affected by Shadow Dance of its corresponding level.

abilities.name: Shadow Dance
abilities.description: When activated, Slark hides himself in a cloud of shadows, becoming immune to both vision and True Sight.Attacking, casting abilities, and using items will not reveal Slark within the duration.

talents.left: +1 Essence Shift Agility Change per Stack
